name: Gmail Triage Automation (Cloudflare Workers)
details: Automates Gmail inbox triage on Cloudflare Workers: OAuth2 fetches unread mail, filters by CC/active users, optionally runs Gemini sentiment, persists results in D1 (users + mail_results), and sends deduplicated stakeholder alerts. Multi-worker deploy scripts (.dev.vars.*) cover dev/prod; mark-as-read and Gemini scoring are ready to re-enable next.

name: Knowledge Links AI
details: RAG application that turns scattered knowledge into reliable answers: ingests docs, chunks and embeds to a vector store, performs hybrid retrieval with reranking, and assembles responses with grounded citations. Includes feedback + evaluation loop, role-based access, and observability for latency, cost, and quality.

name: MoeGuide
details: This is a tourism and guide discovery web application designed to help users explore Tokyo-based guides and experiences. The platform provides a responsive and ensures seamless frontend–backend communication using a type-safe architecture.

name: Suirikyou
details: Suirikyou is a responsive online quiz web application designed to provide users with an interactive and dynamic quiz-taking experience. The platform allows users to attempt quizzes, navigate between questions, and receive real-time feedback with smooth state management and efficient frontend–backend communication through a type-safe architecture.
